import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut sorted = true
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0

  while i <= n
    mut b = 32
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    end

    if is_ws(b)
      if in_num
        let cur = sign * val
        if have_prev
          if cur < prev
            sorted = false
          end
        end
        prev = cur
        have_prev = true
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 43
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = 0 - 1
        val = 0
      end
    else
      in_num = true
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
